---
title: "LRPLF05: Level factors for phonetic spelling (P), off-floor"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8).
:::

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

If the model was not fitted in "reporting" mode, the results will be more approximate than where additional sampling has been performed.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
factor_summary = pd.read_csv(_here / "factor_summary.csv")
```

## Overview

LRPLF05 is the **level-factors** model for phonetic spelling (`spphon`).

::: {.callout-important title="Off-floor likelihood + level-model crossover caveat"}

Phonetic spelling is heavily floored, so the level outcome is the **off-floor
indicator** (score $> 0$) at each timepoint, modelled by a Bernoulli; the linear
predictor is the log-odds of being off the floor. `group x time` is a per-timepoint
off-floor log-odds for the group (`b_grp_time[t]`); after t2 the waitlist crosses
over, so the **clean randomised contrast lives only at t2** (`b_grp_time[1]`,
labelled *causal*); t3/t4 are post-crossover cohort/timing terms. `ability x time`
and `group x ability` complete the focal set. SES excluded (non-DAG / redundant).

:::

## Model

$$
(P_t > 0) \sim \operatorname{Bernoulli}(\operatorname{expit}(\eta_t)),\quad
\eta_t = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + b_{\text{grp}[t]}\text{group}
  + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + g_{\text{ability}[t]}z(\text{blocks})
  + \gamma_{\text{grp\_ability}}\,\text{group}\,z(\text{blocks}) + u_{\text{child}}.
$$

No `kappa` under the Bernoulli. Priors: shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=24%}
![tau (group)](prior_tau.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_age](prior_gamma_age.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=24%}

## Prior-predictive check

![Prior predictive](prior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Posterior](posterior_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Posterior-predictive check

![Posterior predictive](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Findings

### Factor summary (off-floor log-odds)

```{python}
# | echo: false
factor_summary
```

`b_grp_time[t]` is the group off-floor log-odds at timepoint $t$ (0=t1 ... 3=t4); only `b_grp_time[1]` (t2) is the clean randomised contrast (**causal**). `gamma_ability_time[t]` is the ability association by timepoint; `gamma_grp_ability` the group $\times$ ability cross term. `mean`/`lo`/`hi` = posterior mean + equal-tailed 95% CrI; `prob_positive` = $P(\text{coef} > 0)$.

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
